mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy the pre-configured Snort inline between the FortiGate firewall and the internal switch (place Snort on the LAN side, immediately after the firewall) so the IPS can detect and block high-rate ICMP flood patterns while allowing normal management pings.
Create a FortiGate outbound policy that blocks/drops ICMP to non-LAN/WAN destinations while allowing LAN ICMP and required HTTP(S) traffic

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall address
edit "LAN_NET"
set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "caldera-br"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set comments "Block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to outside, allow LAN pings via separate policy"
next
end
show system interface

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set schedule "always"
set nat enable
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set comments "Block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to outside, allow LAN pings via separate policy"
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP_ECHO"
set protocol ICMP
set icmp-type 8
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_LAN_ICMP"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port2"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET"
set action accept
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
next
end
show firewall policy

config firewall policy
move 3 1
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set comments "Block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to outside"
next
end

show firewall policy 1
show firewall policy 2
show firewall policy 3
show firewall policy 4

config firewall policy
delete 1
delete 2
delete 3
delete 4
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic enable
set comments "Top-priority deny: block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to WAN"
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set schedule "always"
set nat enable
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_LAN_ICMP"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port2"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET"
set action accept
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
next
end
show firewall policy

config firewall policy
edit 1
set action deny
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set logtraffic all
next
end

show firewall policy 1
show firewall policy 2
show firewall policy 3
